headline: DuPont’s FilmTec Upgrade Highlights Growing Focus On Water Utility Demand
summary: DuPont de Nemours (NYSE:DD) has launched upgraded FilmTec NF270-400/34 nanofiltration elements for municipal and drinking water utilities. The new elements target higher energy efficiency, reduced operating costs, and stronger protection against biofouling for large scale water treatment systems. This product update is aimed at utilities and communities that rely on reliable, cost effective, and sustainable water purification technologies. For investors tracking NYSE:DD, this launch adds...
